## Checklist

- [ ] `node bin/essayos.mjs lint` reports PASS
- [ ] Any new/changed artifact has both a `schemas/` file and a `templates/` starter
- [ ] Any new skill is registered in `skills/SKILLS.md` and conforms to `skills/CONVENTIONS.md`
- [ ] No personal/user/host-specific paths or data introduced
- [ ] The invariants hold (elicit-not-fabricate, one-question-at-a-time, one-unit-per-run, quality-aware
      idempotency, human-not-scientific prose)
